app.name: LocalLink
app.subtitle: Local-first orchestration for Docker, PM2, and dev servers

hero.title: Find the local service you need.
hero.body: Launch running services, inspect their connection targets, and use Edge extension exports without remembering ports or paths.

snapshot.detail: rehydrated from Docker, PM2, PWA dev servers, and Windows process probes

services.name: LocalLink MCP Core
services.detail: Exposes read/write lifecycle control and structural config tools to local assistants.

services.name: Postgres Compose
services.detail: Keeps database dependencies visible without leaving the local workspace.

services.name: Queue Worker
services.detail: Consumes local jobs and emits terminal logs for the dashboard tailer.

services.name: Windows File Indexer
services.detail: Detects desktop-side changes and keeps the orchestrator aware of host activity.

services.name: AgentGateway Proxy
services.detail: Kept visible as a future network edge component until a trustworthy runtime probe exists.

tools.name: read_workspace_blueprint
tools.detail: Reads .env, docker-compose.yml, locallink.services.yml, locallink.lock.json, locallink.extensions.yml, optional ecosystem.config.js, and mcp-registry.json as a structural snapshot.

tools.name: patch_workspace_blueprint
tools.detail: Safely mutates the selected infrastructure file without flattening comments or formatting.

tools.name: allocate_system_port
tools.detail: Scans sequentially for the next completely open local port.

tools.name: orchestrate_service
tools.detail: Runs docker, pm2, or taskfile lifecycle commands and streams the terminal output.

tools.name: read_extension_workspace
tools.detail: Returns optional dashboard, proxy, network edge, and observability extension status.

tools.name: read_tool_workspace
tools.detail: Returns version lock status and temporary trial services.

tools.name: update_tool_version
tools.detail: Plans or applies a version lock update.

versions.detail: Temporary service; promote it to persist version state.

extensions.name: Dashboard
extensions.detail: Dashboard is kept out of the default control-plane process. Run locallink dashboard or enable this extension.

extensions.name: Caddy Reverse Proxy
extensions.detail: Caddy is installed and can be enabled as a reverse-proxy extension.

extensions.name: Tailscale Network Edge
extensions.detail: Tailscale is active on local-dev.tailnet.ts.net and exports service ports for private access.

extensions.name: OpenObserve OTEL
extensions.detail: OpenObserve OTEL is optional. Enable it when central logs and traces are wanted.

logs.message: compose-postgres is healthy and responding on 5432.
Vite PWA UI reported a short warm-up delay before HMR stabilized.
Windows File Indexer detected a metadata refresh from the host side.
AgentGateway Proxy has no trustworthy runtime probe yet, so the dashboard keeps it marked unknown.
Snapshot captured for the current local workspace state.

constraints.title: Loopback only
constraints.detail: Phase 1 binds the local UI and the control plane to 127.0.0.1.

constraints.title: External runtime truth
constraints.detail: Each snapshot re-queries Docker, PM2, and Windows process probes instead of trusting in-memory state.

constraints.title: Unknown when unverifiable
constraints.detail: Services fall back to Unknown when a runtime manager is unavailable or LocalLink lacks a trustworthy probe.

timeline.title: Service matrix
timeline.detail: One glance tells you which containers, PM2 workers, and host processes are live.

timeline.title: Log tailing
timeline.detail: Lifecycle, runtime, and alert events remain readable in a terminal-style pane.

timeline.title: Port allocation
timeline.detail: New services get a deterministic open port before the config is written.
